Emily runs a dog rescue center and currently has 25 dogs. On Thursday, she received 4 puppies from a nearby town, bringing the total number of dogs to 29. On Friday, a family brought in a stray dog, increasing the total to 30. On Saturday, 2 families adopted 3 dogs each, reducing the total number of dogs to 24. 

*** 

The number of dogs in Emily's rescue center is [current_dogs]. The total number of dogs received on Thursday was [puppies_received], and the number of dogs brought in on Friday was [stray_dog_brought_in]. On Saturday, [adopted_dogs_per_family] dogs were adopted by each family, resulting in a total of [total_adopted_dogs]. The final count of dogs in the center is [final_dogs].
